text: Being here, I feel a curious tension between the sterile design of the hallway and the vibrant invitation of the R+D space beyond the glass. The angles and reflections distort my sense of orientation, making me more aware of my presence in this constructed environment, where innovation and inquiry are on display. I am drawn inward, wondering how the boundaries of knowledge are expanded within these walls, and how I, too, participate in this ongoing project of discovery.
